revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_ODNB%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{CS1 wrapper|base=cite encyclopedia}} __FORCETOC__ == Usage == '''{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|doi{{=}}{{var|ODNB doi}}|title{{=}}{{var|ODNB article name}}}}''' For example, '''{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|doi{{=}}10.1093/ref:odnb/29986|title{{=}}Worsley, Sir Richard}}''' displays: :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|doi=10.1093/ref:odnb/29986|title=Worsley, Sir Richard}} '''List of supported parameters''' This template supports all parameters that are supported by {{tlx|cite encyclopedia}}. Several parameters have pre-set defaults (but may be overridden): * {{para|encyclopedia|[[Oxford Dictionary of National Biography]]}} * {{para|edition|online}} * {{para|publisher|[[Oxford University Press]]}} To override the defaults, type the parameter and a value, like {{Cite ODNB|encyclopedia=Oxford Dictionary of National Biography|edition=14th}} Article author (for the full set of author parameters, see {{tlx|cite encyclopedia}}): * {{para|first|{{var|first name of the article author, if present}}}} * {{para|last|{{var|last name of the article author, if present}}}} Article titles and identification: * {{para|title|{{var|name of the ODNB article}}}} * {{para|doi|{{var|doi}}}}—use where available on the ODNB page * {{para|id|{{var|number}}}}—Use ONLY if a doi is not available. This is a nonstandard parameter and consists of the "article number" (often the last set of digits of a biography URL). Avoid if possible as it as it does not always generate the correct link * {{para|url|{{var|URL of the ODNB article}}}}—Can be used with or in place of the parameter id=. Is essential for ODNB some non-biography articles such as "Themes" which neither have a doi nor conform to the usual ODNB url biography format. * Example: ** {{Green|Patrick Little, ‘Major-generals (act. 1655–1657)’, Oxford Dictionary of National Biography, Oxford University Press. http://www.oxforddnb.com/view/theme/95468}} ** This can be handled like this (url): **:{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}} |first{{=}}Patrick |last{{=}}Little |title{{=}}Major-generals (act. 1655–1657) |url{{=}}http://www.oxforddnb.com/view/theme/95468}} **::{{{{BASEPAGENAME}} |first=Patrick |last=Little |title=Major-generals (act. 1655–1657) |url=http://www.oxforddnb.com/view/theme/95468}} ** or like this (doi): **:{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}} |first{{=}}Patrick |last{{=}}Little |title{{=}}Major-generals (act. 1655–1657) |doi{{=}}10.1093/ref:odnb/95468}} **::{{{{BASEPAGENAME}} |first=Patrick |last=Little |title=Major-generals (act. 1655–1657) |doi=10.1093/ref:odnb/95468}} ** or like this (id): **:{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}} |first{{=}}Patrick |last{{=}}Little |title{{=}}Major-generals (act. 1655–1657) |id{{=}}95468}} **::{{{{BASEPAGENAME}} |first=Patrick |last=Little |title=Major-generals (act. 1655–1657) |id=95468}} Years and dates * {{para|origyear|{{var|original year}}}}—The initial year of publication is usually 2004; if the entry has been updated, the current year parameter may be different. * {{para|year|{{var|year of ODNB article publication}}}} * {{para|date|{{var|date of ODNB article publication}}}}—Only set both date and year parameters if date is in YYYY-MM-DD format. In such cases the date parameter value is displayed but year parameter value is used by templates such as {{Tl|harvnb}}. * {{para|access-date}}—Not needed as the ODNB has both date of article modification, a builtin archive and a doi structure; if used, requires {{para|url}} Some articles are freely available to the public, such as [https://doi.org/10.1093/ref:odnb/37018 Virginia Woolf]. In those cases, you can add the optional {{para|freearticle}} parameter. * {{para|freearticle|y}} *: {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}} |id{{=}}37018 |title{{=}}Woolf [''née'' Stephen], (Adeline) Virginia |first{{=}}Lyndall |last{{=}}Gordon |freearticle{{=}}y}} *:: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}} |id=37018 |title=Woolf [''née'' Stephen], (Adeline) Virginia |first=Lyndall |last=Gordon |freearticle=y}} == Hidden categories == This template places articles that incorporate it into an administrative hidden Category: * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from the ODNB]] Pages using both {{para|id}} and {{para|doi}} are tracked in [[:Category:Pages using cite ODNB with both doi and id parameters]] == See also == * {{tl|ODNBsub}}—A subscription template used as a postscript by this template. * {{tl|DNBfirst}}—Can be placed on the same line as {{Tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} to allow readers who do not have access to ODNB to see older versions of the text now in the public domain. This is particularly useful if there is a version of the text available on Wikisource. Please refrain from using this template if the same DNB article is already available in the Wikipedia article via {{Tl|Cite DNB}} or {{Tl|DNB}}. * {{tl|Who's Who}} * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Dictionary of National Biography]]. * {{tl|Subscription or libraries}}—A template for use when a subscription may be required or the source may be at a library. {{sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Cite Odnb}} }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Dictionary of National Biography templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
